records.ety: [L. cooperatus, p. p. of cooperari to cooperate; co + operari to work, opus work. See Operate.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Cooperated; p. pr. & vb. n. Cooperating.]

defs: To act or operate jointly with another or others; to concur in action, effort, or effect.
quotes: Whate'er cooperates to the common mirth.
